steps.title: Use the cluster clue
steps.content: Agglomeration economies involve firms in related industries clustering in one place. The Wolverhampton example shows iron, steel, cutlery, and hardware firms concentrating in the same area.

steps.title: Reject illogical verbs
steps.content: Choice A means intervene between parties, Choice B means agree with, and Choice C means attract or request. None describes multiple firms physically gathering in a location.

steps.title: Choose the gathering verb
steps.content: Choice D means gather or accumulate in a place, which matches the idea of related firms clustering in one area. The answer is D.
